name: SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionReq_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionReq_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionReq_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char SelectedPaymentOption[], byte SelectedServiceIDs[], byte SelectedParameterSetIDs[], dword ServiceIDCount )
description: Creates a Payment Service Selection Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
